differential_diagnoses: Metabolic encephalopathy (e.g., uremic or related to opioid/medication side effects)
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (to rule out infection and inflammatory processes)
Perform comprehensive serum laboratory workup including renal function, electrolytes, magnesium, and toxicology
Discontinue or adjust medications that could contribute to neurotoxicity or vasogenic edema
Neurology and hematology consultation for management of sickle cell–associated neurologic complications
